title: secretx-env: implement environment variable backend
description: Implement SecretStore for environment variables. URI: secretx://env/<VAR_NAME>. get() calls std::env::var(name), wraps result in SecretValue. put() returns SecretError::NotFound (env vars are not writable at runtime in a meaningful way). refresh() re-reads the env var (supports process managers that rotate env vars). No caching. No external deps beyond secretx-core. This is a default-enabled backend; must compile and test with no cloud credentials.
